elements.original_description: A person holding a stack of dollar bills in one hand, with a distressed facial expression, standing in front of a plain white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person holding a stack of dollar bills in one hand, with a distressed facial expression, standing in front of a plain white background. Cinematic lighting, soft bokeh, high resolution, detailed texture of the bills and skin, emotional and tense mood, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A person sitting on an empty wallet, looking sad and frustrated, with a thought bubble showing a broken heart, against a plain white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person sitting on an empty wallet, looking sad and frustrated, with a thought bubble showing a broken heart, against a plain white background. Cinematic lighting, sharp focus, high resolution, detailed expression and clothing, melancholic and emotional tone, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
